## InstallXOptions.bus property

The [XBus](./x-components.xbus.md) used in the [XPlugin](./x-components.xplugin.md)<!-- -->. If not passed an instance of [BaseXBus](./x-components.basexbus.md) will be used.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
bus?: XBus;
```
